flow_description: cycle_runner Step 1 calls adapter_orchestrator → run_orchestrator() which fetches live APY via DeFiLlama feed for 6 adapters. apy_map = _live_apy_map(adapters). Newer adapters (morpho_steakhouse, pendle_pt, spark_susds, fluid_fusdc) are NOT in orchestrators ADAPTER_REGISTRY and therefore NOT in apy_map. Strategies (S2 etc.) use apy_map.get(protocol, FALLBACK_APY) — so for missing keys they fall back to hardcoded constants. MP-389 code refreshes adapter_registry AFTER allocation but REGISTRY is empty — no effect.

aave_v3.note: Live DeFiLlama feed. In orchestrator ADAPTER_REGISTRY. apy_pct=3.2147 at last cycle.

compound_v3.note: Orchestrator compound_v3 uses DeFiLlama → 3.20%. Newer compound_v3_adapter.py reads adapter_status.json → fallback 4.8%. ONLY orchestrator value feeds apy_map.

morpho_blue.note: Live DeFiLlama feed. In orchestrator ADAPTER_REGISTRY. apy_pct=4.7507 at last cycle.

morpho_steakhouse.note: NOT in orchestrator ADAPTER_REGISTRY. Reads adapter_status.json[morpho_steakhouse].apy = None → fallback 6.5%. NOT in apy_map → strategies use FALLBACK_APY[morpho_steakhouse]=6.5.

pendle_pt.feed: Pendle REST API (live_enabled=True, but network_unavailable at last run)
pendle_pt.note: PendlePTAdapter.get_apy() makes live REST call to Pendle API v2. Last result: fallback 8.0% (network_unavailable). NOT in orchestrator → NOT in apy_map. File pendle_pt_rest_adapter.py does NOT exist (only pendle_pt_adapter.py).

pendle.note: PendleAdapter is in orchestrator registry but returned no data at last cycle (no apy_pct in orchestrator status output). Protocol key is pendle (not pendle_pt).

spark_susds.note: GSM Pause Delay = 0h (need >= 48h per ADR). allocation_cap=0. NOT in orchestrator. Research mode — mock APY only. NOT in apy_map.

fluid_fusdc.note: GSM Pause Delay = 0h (need >= 48h per ADR). allocation_cap=0. NOT in orchestrator. Research mode — mock APY only. NOT in apy_map.

pendle_yt.note: YT APY requires on-chain calculation or specialized API. S10 uses hardcoded APY_YT_BASE_PCT. ADR-021: advisory only, no automatic position opening.

yearn_v3.note: Live DeFiLlama feed. In orchestrator ADAPTER_REGISTRY. apy_pct=3.3558 at last cycle.

euler_v2.note: Live DeFiLlama feed. In orchestrator ADAPTER_REGISTRY. apy_pct=2.7829 at last cycle.

maple.note: Live DeFiLlama feed. In orchestrator ADAPTER_REGISTRY. apy_pct=4.7366 at last cycle.

summary.action_needed: Main apy_map already uses live DeFiLlama data for 6 adapters. Patch: merge adapter_status.json fallback values for missing keys (morpho_steakhouse, pendle_pt) into apy_map after orchestrator step, before tournament/allocation. spark_susds/fluid_fusdc: blocked by GSM gate (0h < 48h) — no action needed yet. REGISTRY in adapter_registry.py is empty — MP-389 refresh_all() does nothing currently.

key_findings: cycle_runner apy_map строится из РЕАЛЬНЫХ адаптеров через orchestrator (DeFiLlama feeds)
apy_map ключи: aave_v3, compound_v3, morpho_blue, yearn_v3, euler_v2, maple
ОТСУТСТВУЮТ в apy_map: morpho_steakhouse, pendle_pt, spark_susds, fluid_fusdc
Стратегии S2–S7 используют apy_map.get(protocol, FALLBACK_APY) — для missing ключей используются hardcoded константы
MP-389 refresh_all() вызывается ПОСЛЕ allocation и REGISTRY пуст — нет эффекта
pendle_pt_rest_adapter.py НЕ существует (только pendle_pt_adapter.py с FALLBACK_APY=8.0)
recommendation: Приоритет 1: добавить merge adapter_status.json fallback values в apy_map после шага 1 в cycle_runner. Приоритет 2: добавить morpho_steakhouse APY в adapter_status.json (из DeFiLlama или Morpho API). Приоритет 3: зарегистрировать PendlePTAdapter в ADAPTER_REGISTRY для живых данных. Приоритет 4: когда GSM >= 48h — добавить spark_susds/fluid_fusdc в orchestrator registry.
